# TS9701

**Category:** Import Resolution · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Did you mean to import '{suggestion}' from '{module}'?
```

## Explanation

An unresolved identifier matches a known typeclass or extension.

The symbol exists but isn't imported. Add the suggested import
to resolve this error.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
